app/main.py · financial-fraud-mlops-pipeline
view source
from fastapi import FastAPI; from pydantic import BaseModel; import joblib, numpy as np, os
app    = FastAPI(title="Fraud Detection API")
model  = joblib.load(f"models/{sorted(os.listdir('models'))[-1]}")
scaler = joblib.load("models/scaler.pkl")
threshold = float(open("models/threshold.txt").read())
class Input(BaseModel): features: list[float]
@app.post("/predict")
def predict(d: Input):
    p = model.predict_proba(scaler.transform([d.features]))[0][1]
    return {"fraud_probability": round(p,4), "prediction": int(p >= threshold)}
train_model.py · credit-risk-ml-api
view source
import xgboost as xgb, joblib, numpy as np, pandas as pd
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split
from sklearn.preprocessing  import StandardScaler
np.random.seed(42); n = 5000
df = pd.DataFrame({"credit_score": np.random.randint(300,851,n),
    "annual_income": np.random.uniform(20000,200000,n),
    "existing_debt": np.random.uniform(0,100000,n)})
df["default"] = ((df.credit_score < 580) & (df.existing_debt > 40000)).astype(int)
sc  = StandardScaler()
X_tr,X_te,y_tr,y_te = train_test_split(df.drop("default",axis=1), df.default, test_size=.2)
mdl = xgb.XGBClassifier(n_estimators=200, max_depth=6, eval_metric="auc")
mdl.fit(sc.fit_transform(X_tr), y_tr)
joblib.dump(mdl, "credit_model.pkl"); joblib.dump(sc, "scaler.pkl")
train_forecast.py · retail-demand-forecast-ml
view source
import pandas as pd, numpy as np, joblib
from sklearn.ensemble import RandomForestRegressor
df = pd.read_csv("data/train.csv", parse_dates=["Date"]).sort_values(["Store","Date"])
df["Lag_1"] = df.groupby("Store")["Weekly_Sales"].shift(1)
df["Lag_4"] = df.groupby("Store")["Weekly_Sales"].shift(4)
df["Week"]  = df.Date.dt.isocalendar().week.astype(int); df = df.dropna()
feat = ["Store","Week","IsHoliday","Temperature","Lag_1","Lag_4"]
tr, te = df[df.Date < "2012-04-01"], df[df.Date >= "2012-04-01"]
mdl = RandomForestRegressor(n_estimators=200, max_depth=15, n_jobs=-1)
mdl.fit(tr[feat], tr.Weekly_Sales)
mape = np.mean(np.abs((te.Weekly_Sales - mdl.predict(te[feat])) / te.Weekly_Sales)) * 100
print(f"MAPE: {mape:.2f}%")  # 4.66%
app.py · ai-resume-rag-system
view source
from sentence_transformers import SentenceTransformer
from sklearn.metrics.pairwise import cosine_similarity
import numpy as np, fitz  # PyMuPDF
model = SentenceTransformer("sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2")
def match_resume(resume, jd):
    skills = ["python","pytorch","rag","docker","sql","aws","mlflow"]
    r_sk = {s for s in skills if s in resume.lower()}
    j_sk = {s for s in skills if s in jd.lower()}
    sem  = cosine_similarity(model.encode([resume]), model.encode([jd]))[0][0] * 100
    skl  = len(r_sk & j_sk) / max(len(j_sk),1) * 100
    return sem*.4 + skl*.6, r_sk & j_sk, j_sk - r_sk
